title: An Act to Support the Maine Service Fellows Program
last_house_action: 4/13/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/13/2026 - PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.

sponsors.name: Aaron DANA of the Passamaquoddy Tribe Representative Holly EATON

actions.description: Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY in concurrence
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

Report of the Chair-Pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 Representative HASENFUS from the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY Reports a recommendation for a CHANGE OF COMMITEE . Report was READ and ACCEPTED . On motion of Representative HASENFUS, the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT . Sent for concurrence.

Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. On motion by Senator Beebe-Center of Knox for the Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety REFERRED to the Committee on Housing and Economic Development, in concurrence.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) READ and ADOPTED , in concurrence. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (H-338), in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending ENACTMENT in concurrence
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.

On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin taken from the Special Appropriations Table On motion by Same Senator the Senate SUSPENDED THE RULES to RECONSIDER their actions whereby the Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED by Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) in concurrence. On further motion by Same Senator the Senate SUSPENDED THE RULES to RECONSIDER their actions whereby Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) was ADOPTED. On further motion by Same Senator Senate Amendment "A" (S-676) to Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) READ and ADOPTED. Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-676) thereto ADOPTED. PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-676) thereto in NON-CONCURRENCE. Sent down for concurrence.
The House RECEDED and CONCURRED to PASSAGE TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-338) as Amended by Senate Amendment "A" (S-676) thereto. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
PASSED TO BE ENACTED , in concurrence.
